title: Love Lettering Balloon in Silver – XXL Foil Balloon as Wedding Decoration, Gift or Love Surprise for Valentine's Day
features: Box contents: balloon love lettering in silver, ideal as a gift or attention for marriage proposal/engagement, wedding anniversary, Valentine's Day or as a token of love
Top quality: foil balloons in best quality with taped seams and attachment eyelets, suitable for filling with air.
Eye-catching: surprise your loved one or the bride and groom, ideal as a selfie or picture background. Widely used in wedding shoots as photo accessories or props
Reusable: thanks to the self-closing valve, the balloons can be filled and used multiple times.
Universal: the love balloon is sent unfilled. Depending on your needs, you can fill the foil balloon with air and attach it easily thanks to the low weight and the hanging devices
description: Product Description Get the beautiful eye-catcher for your next event Surprise your loved one or the bride and groom at the next wedding. The love lettering balloon is ideal as a selfie or picture background for unforgettable photos. It is also popular for wedding or baby shoots as a photo accessory or prop to give the pictures a great expression. You can also use the balloon perfect for different occasions such as marriage proposal/engagement, wedding anniversary, Valentine's Day Unpack, inflate, be happy! Balloonfritz, your balloon retailer of trust! We are a small but fine company from Germany with attention to detail. With our balloons, we want to make your next event something very special Box contents: In addition to the love lettering balloon in your favourite colour of your choice, your package includes inflation instructions and a straw. Balloon fritz love - lettering balloon in rose gold, silver, gold, pink or red XXL foil balloon as wedding decoration, love gift or surprise Due to the size (approx. 75 cm long and 60 cm high) and colour will make you an eye-catcher at any party or wedding and are among the most popular photo motifs of newlyweds, lovers and guests Top quality: Best quality foil balloons with taped seams and fixing eyelets for hanging. Reusable: Thanks to the self-closing valve and the included straw, the balloons can be filled and used several times. Universal: The love balloon will be sent unfilled. Depending on your needs, you can fill the foil balloon with air and easily attach it thanks to the low weight and the hanging devices. Wedding photos Take an unforgettable photo of the most beautiful day of your life The balloon is ideal as a photo accessory or prop for wedding or after-wedding shoots! Baby photos Do you want to create a beautiful memory or birth card? Then use the love balloon as a decoration next to the little ones at your next baby shoot Home decoration The beautiful love balloon can be used as a home decoration in your living room. It also looks good in the bedroom and ensures the right mood Travel companion Whether in Paris, New York or at your next destination. Pack the balloon in your handbag and your memories and travel are captured even more beautiful with the love lettering balloon
